name: Hearty Chicken Noodle Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large kettle, combine the stewing chicken, water, onion, parsley, celery, chicken bouillon cubes, peppercorns, cloves, bay leaf, salt, pepper, and dried thyme. Bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 2 1/2 hours or until the chicken is tender.
3. Remove chicken from broth; cool.
4. Debone the chicken and cut into chunks.
5. Strain broth and skim fat; return to kettle.
6. Add chicken and carrots.
7. For noodles, mix flour and salt in a medium bowl.
8. Make a well in the center of the flour mixture.
9. Beat egg and milk; pour into the well.
10. Stir together, forming a dough. Turn dough onto a floured surface; knead 8-10 times.
11. Roll into a rectangle measuring approximately 12 inches by 9 inches.
12. Cut noodles into strips, then cut the strips into 1-inch pieces.
13. Bring soup to a simmer; add noodles.
14. Cover and cook for 12-15 minutes or until noodles are tender.
15. Yield: 10-12 servings.
